title: Dates and time chat
text: See you at 3 today. Meet at 4:30. The show starts at 8 PM on June 15. My flight at 9:45 AM tomorrow at noon sharp.

tips.text: Real chat format: "3 today" or "8 PM tomorrow"

tips.target: See you at 3 today. Meet at 4:30. The show starts at 8

tips.text: Numbers should flow as fast as letters by now

tips.target: PM on June 15. My flight at 9:45 AM tomorrow at noon sharp.

character_tips.anna: Real chat format. Dates + times = daily life.
character_tips.maxim: Time-and-date prose is high-frequency. Drill it.
character_tips.knopych: 📅 CALENDAR MODE! Days and times in flow!
character_tips.klavochka: Making plans with friends, my dear 📆
